name: Agent Authorization Chain Verifier (four-phase, fail-closed)
notes: The composed four-phase agent-authorization chain verifier extracted from accountable-agent-runtime (decision D2): assembly -> A (credential integrity + signed policy-content digest) -> B (cross-binding) -> C (status/revocation) -> D (ODRL delegation walk), plus the D9 identity-composition rule. Pure and injectable: zero I/O, zero RDF parsing - all network enters through the resolveKey / isControlledBy / resolveStatus seams. The standalone artifact a second implementation reproduces; the agentic-solid-conformance agent-authz-credential vectors test this surface. Golden decision matrix ported from the runtime (verdict parity row for row).
